trustBar.title: Trusted by retail brands in Vietnam

steps.subtitle: No tech expertise required — just run your store the way you already do.

items.title: Quick setup
items.description: Add products, staff, and shifts with an intuitive guide in just minutes.

items.title: Start selling
items.description: Create your first order — stock, reports, and loyalty are automated.

items.title: See growth
items.description: Track best-sellers and peak hours to make smarter decisions.

stats.title: Growing with Vietnam’s retail ecosystem
stats.subtitle: From big cities to smaller towns, 360 Retail helps shop owners track revenue and customers by region to optimize campaigns and resources.

testimonials.title: What shop owners say about 360 Retail

items.name: Mai Huong
items.content: Before 360 Retail, I had to write things down and then enter Excel, which caused missed orders and stock mistakes. Now everything is automated and far less stressful.

items.name: Tuan Nguyen
items.role: Coffee chain (3 branches), Ho Chi Minh City
items.content: I love seeing revenue by shift and by branch on one screen. It makes menu and promo decisions much more confident.

items.name: Lan Hanh
items.content: Staff learned the system in one session. Automatic loyalty points bring customers back and stabilize revenue.

items.name: Quoc Phong
items.content: We used to mix up stock between online and in-store. With 360 Retail, we no longer have to apologize for out-of-stock items.

footer.tagline: An omnichannel sales platform for small and medium stores — as easy as a mobile app.
footer.copyright: © 2025 360 Retail. Built for shop owners, by shop owners.

platform.subtitle: Three core modules work together: People for workforce, Product for inventory, Customer for CRM. Connected data, smooth operations.

people.label: People
people.subtitle: Staff & shift management
people.description: GPS timekeeping, automatic shift planning, and smart payroll. No more paperwork and mistakes.

product.label: Product
product.subtitle: POS & inventory
product.description: Fast selling, automatic stock deduction, and online-offline sync. One POS, manage all channels.

customer.label: Customer
customer.subtitle: CRM & loyalty
customer.description: Points and perks for every purchase. Automatic tracking and customer care by segment.
